hero.title: Fresh From Farm
hero.subtitle: Premium bulk fruits and vegetables supplied directly to wholesalers, retailers, restaurants, hotels, and institutional buyers across India.

about.title: Two Decades of
about.body: Founded in 2001, Green Harvest Produce has grown into one of India's most trusted bulk suppliers of fresh fruits and vegetables. We bridge the gap between farmers and businesses, ensuring premium quality produce reaches your facility on time, every time.
about.missionText: To deliver the freshest, highest-quality produce while supporting Indian farmers and creating sustainable supply chains.
about.visionText: To become India's #1 bulk produce distribution network, reaching every corner of the country.

products.title: Farm-Fresh Selection
products.subtitle: Sourced directly from certified farms across India. Available year-round with seasonal varieties.

why.title: The Green Harvest Difference
why.subtitle: We don't just supply produce — we deliver a complete supply chain solution built around your business needs.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.desc: Every batch is inspected and graded to meet FSSAI and export-quality standards.

delivery.title: On-Time Delivery
delivery.desc: Our fleet of 50+ refrigerated vehicles ensures timely delivery to your facility.

pricing.title: Competitive Bulk Pricing
pricing.desc: Direct farm procurement eliminates middlemen — savings passed on to you.

cold.title: Cold Chain Certified
cold.desc: State-of-the-art cold storage at every stage from farm to final delivery.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your order from dispatch to delivery with our logistics dashboard.

support.desc: Dedicated account managers available around the clock for your queries.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: From a small operation in Pune to India's trusted bulk produce partner — 25 years of farm-to-business excellence.
aboutPage.storyP1: Green Harvest Produce was born in 2001 from a simple but powerful idea: eliminate the inefficiencies between farmers and businesses that needed fresh produce in bulk.
aboutPage.storyP2: Founder Suresh Patel, a second-generation farmer, saw first-hand how good produce was being wasted due to poor logistics and how businesses were paying premium prices for mediocre quality. He set out to build a bridge.
aboutPage.storyP3: Starting with just three refrigerated trucks and partnerships with 20 local farmers in Pune's fringe areas, Green Harvest began supplying to local restaurants and small supermarkets. The quality spoke for itself, and word spread fast.
aboutPage.storyP4: Today, we operate a fleet of 50+ vehicles, manage four cold storage facilities across Maharashtra, and supply to 1,200+ businesses across 15 Indian states.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Honest, transparent sourcing with fair pricing for farmers and buyers alike.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Promoting eco-friendly farming practices and minimizing food waste.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: Uncompromising quality standards at every stage of our supply chain.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: Building long-term, mutually beneficial relationships with all stakeholders.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Delivering on our promises consistently — on time, every time.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: Continuously improving our processes, technology, and service standards.

aboutPage.certSubtitle: Every certificate is a commitment to the highest standards in food safety and quality.
aboutPage.m2001: Founded in Pune with 3 trucks and 20 farmer partners
aboutPage.m2005: Expanded to Mumbai and Nashik markets
aboutPage.m2010: Opened first cold storage warehouse (10,000 sq ft)
aboutPage.m2015: Launched corporate supply division for hotels & restaurants
aboutPage.m2022: Expanded to 15 states with 50+ vehicle fleet
aboutPage.m2024: Launched export division for international markets

productsPage.heroSubtitle: Sourced directly from certified farms across India. Premium quality, consistent supply.
productsPage.packagingSubtitle: We offer flexible packaging to match your requirements — branded, private-label, or standard.

bulkSupplyPage.heroSubtitle: Whether you run a 50-cover restaurant or a pan-India supermarket chain, we have a supply solution designed for your scale and needs.
bulkSupplyPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Set Up Your Supply?
bulkSupplyPage.ctaSubtitle: Talk to our sales team today and get a customised quote within 2 hours.

s1.title: Submit Inquiry
s1.desc: Fill out our inquiry form with your product, quantity, and delivery requirements.

s2.title: Get Custom Quote
s2.desc: Our sales team prepares a tailored quote within 2-4 business hours.

s3.title: Confirm & Schedule
s3.desc: Review, confirm, and set your preferred delivery schedule.

s4.title: Regular Delivery
s4.desc: Receive fresh produce on your doorstep as per the agreed schedule.

bulkSupplyPage.seg1Desc: Consistent, chef-grade quality tailored for high-volume kitchens. Daily deliveries available.
bulkSupplyPage.seg2Desc: Premium-grade produce for 3-star to 5-star properties. Customised delivery schedules to match your kitchen's needs.
bulkSupplyPage.seg3Desc: Consistent shelf-ready produce with proper sorting, grading, and packaging for retail display.
bulkSupplyPage.seg4Desc: Large-volume procurement at competitive rates. Direct-from-farm pricing with consistent grading.
bulkSupplyPage.seg5Desc: Bulk, specification-grade raw materials for processing plants — consistent Brix, size, and moisture levels.
bulkSupplyPage.seg6Desc: APEDA-certified export quality produce with full phytosanitary compliance for international shipments.

logisticsPage.heroSubtitle: Our integrated cold chain logistics network ensures your produce arrives fresh, on time, and at the right temperature — no exceptions.
logisticsPage.cap1Desc: Continuous temperature monitoring from -2C to 8C ensures produce freshness throughout transit.
logisticsPage.cap2Desc: Four strategically located cold storage facilities across Maharashtra with combined capacity of 50,000 MT.
logisticsPage.cap3Desc: 50+ owned and partnered refrigerated trucks with GPS tracking for real-time monitoring.
logisticsPage.cap4Desc: Delivery to 200+ cities and towns across 15 states with last-mile partnerships in Tier-2 & Tier-3 cities.
logisticsPage.cap5Desc: GPS-enabled shipment tracking. Clients receive automated dispatch and delivery notifications via SMS and email.
logisticsPage.cap6Desc: 98.7% on-time delivery rate maintained over the last 12 months, with 24/7 operations team support.
logisticsPage.warehouseNetworkSubtitle: Strategically located across Maharashtra for maximum freshness and speed.
logisticsPage.coverageSubtitle: Delivering to 200+ cities across 15 states, with growing reach every quarter.
logisticsPage.ctaSubtitle: Discuss your delivery requirements with our logistics team.
